steps.action: Open pay-token selector from swap widget
steps.expected: Selector lists at least CASH, USD1, USDC, USDT, USDe, GHO
steps.observed: Selector displayed CASH, USD1, USDC, USDT, USDe, GHO with distinct icon letters/colors

evidence.network: UI-only selector validation; no assertion-specific network dependency

steps.expected: Swap defaults to USD1 pay token and CASH receive/base token
steps.observed: Default widget showed You pay = USD1 and You receive = CASH

evidence.consoleErrors: background 429 polling noise present globally, no crash
evidence.network: Background GET /market and related polling requests from app

steps.action: Inspect default token pair and visible pricing labels
steps.expected: Primary pair is CASH/USD1 with USD1-denominated quote context
steps.observed: Swap defaults to USD1 -> CASH and token header/price display remained USD-denominated for CASH

steps.action: Switch pay token to USDT and enter amount 25
steps.expected: Non-USD1 quote appears with Panora routing indicator

steps.observed: Route displayed as 'USDT → CASH via Panora'

evidence.consoleErrors: background 429 polling noise; quote UI remained functional
evidence.network: Panora route text rendered in UI details ('via Panora'); agent-browser request listing did not expose response status for Panora URL

assertions.title: Smart routing display

steps.action: Set pay token to USD1 and enter amount 25
steps.expected: Price details should show Direct (orderbook) for CASH/USD1
steps.observed: CTA remained 'Enter an amount to see price details'; direct route label never surfaced

steps.action: Set pay token to USDT and expand details
steps.expected: Routed path shown for non-USD1 pair
steps.observed: Route shown as 'USDT → CASH via Panora'

evidence.consoleErrors: repeated 'Failed to load resource: 429 (Too Many Requests)' while validating direct CASH/USD1 quote
evidence.network: High-frequency GET /market polling from localhost:3100 with 429 errors prevented reliable direct quote rendering

assertions.issues: Direct-route half of assertion could not be validated due persistent API rate-limit behavior; routed half validated.

steps.action: Block Panora domain in-browser via network route and request USDT->CASH quote
steps.expected: User-friendly error state without UI crash
steps.observed: Swap displayed warning '⚠ Failed to fetch' and button label 'Route unavailable'

evidence.consoleErrors: No fatal runtime crash; fallback UI rendered under forced fetch failure
evidence.network: Panora calls intentionally aborted using agent-browser network route '**api.panora.exchange/**'

frictions.description: Local API polling produced sustained HTTP 429 responses, creating noisy console output and interfering with direct CASH/USD1 quote visibility.
frictions.resolution: Retried token/amount flow with waits; issue persisted.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request listing did not provide response status details for Panora calls in this run.
frictions.resolution: Used visible routing text plus forced Panora request blocking to validate normal and error states.

blockers.description: Direct CASH/USD1 route indicator could not be validated because local API quote/polling path remained rate-limited (429), preventing direct price-details state from materializing.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Repeated USD1 input flow after token resets and backoff waits; direct details remained unavailable while 429 errors continued.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 1 blocked (VAL-MULTI-005 direct-route portion blocked by persistent local API 429 rate limiting).
